# Xefe

> Xefe is an HR, payroll, and accounting platform built for Timor-Leste.
> It handles Lei Trabalho (labor law) compliance, WIT withholding tax, INSS
> social security, 13th-month salary (subsidio anual), bank payroll files
> (BNU, BNCTL, Mandiri, ANZ), double-entry accounting, and invoicing.
> Interfaces are available in Tetun, English, and Portuguese.
> "Xefe" is Tetun for "boss".

## Product

- [Landing page](https://xefe.tl/): product overview and Timor-Leste compliance details
- [How Xefe works](https://xefe.tl/how-it-works): plain-language workflow, inspectable payroll example, accounting controls, outputs, and validation approach
- [Security](https://xefe.tl/security): server-enforced isolation, two-person payroll approval, backups and privacy design
- [The Xefe engine](https://xefe.tl/engine): the payroll and accounting engine — Timor-Leste statutes implemented rule by rule, checked against real-world practice and official tax-authority assessments
- [Pricing](https://xefe.tl/pricing): one flat price — $4 per employee per month, every feature included; free to set up, subscription only required to finalize payroll. Founding offer: businesses that sign up now get 6 months free.
- [Accountant partners](https://xefe.tl/accountants): optional accountant support from a Dili accounting and audit firm (announcement coming soon), with explicit business-controlled access
- [Sign up](https://xefe.tl/auth/signup): self-serve organization creation with a free trial

## Family

- Ekipa: the employee companion app (payslips, leave requests, crew clock-in) for Android
- Kaixa: money tracking and simple POS app for small vendors (coming soon)
- XefeBot: WhatsApp assistant for HR managers to query their company data

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://xefe.tl/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://xefe.tl/terms)
